goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The product persists and renders the exact required 50 g row. The test's hasText filter cannot match a product name stored only in input values/accessibility labels. Replace only that filter with a semantic descendant quantity-label locator; preserve the 50 g assertion and all fixtures.

worker_package.objective: Repair one semantic row locator, then complete Pantry browser/accessibility/screenshots, disposable DB, port, and diff evidence.

evidence: Rendered error contexts show a 50 g Red lentils item.
Database proves 400 g required, 350 g available, 50 g shortage with complete provenance.
The article textContent omits the input value, while the Red lentils quantity accessibility label is present.

parallel_safety.rationale: One mirror, port, browser output, and disposable DB.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 queued until passing receipt.
